title: Morning Briefing — March 26, 2026
content:
## Today's Critical Path

- Freedom install warmup sequence is blocked on confirmation from Drew
- HubSpot tier recommendation needs a one-line decision before tomorrow's pipeline review

### Watchouts

```next_action

Send recommendation note
```
summary: 3 blocking items: diversity hold, April warmup, HubSpot tier

title: Lordon Weekly Ops Report
content:
## Store Health Summary
- Halifax conversion up 6.2% week over week
- Moncton returns normalized after denim exchange spike
- Saint John low-stock alerts fired on outerwear and basics

### Recommended Moves
- Rebalance core sizes from Halifax to Saint John
- Keep paid spend flat until replenishment lands
summary: Conversion improved, but Saint John needs stock rebalancing this week

title: Menlo Security Research Snapshot
content:
## Competitive Notes
- Menlo is winning trust with security-first positioning
- Buyers respond best to ROI framed as reduced analyst drag

### ICP Signals
- Mid-market IT leaders with recent phishing or browser isolation reviews
- Teams already paying for multiple overlapping security tools

### Messaging Angle
**Lead with cost of alert fatigue**, then quantify regained hours
summary: Security buyers care more about analyst drag and tool overlap than feature depth

title: SolveWorks Client Health Scorecard
content:
## Current Scorecard
- Darryl: Green on engagement, yellow on follow-through
- Drew: Green on adoption, green on responsiveness
- Mike: Yellow on dashboard freshness, green on infrastructure uptime

### Interpretation
- Strong retention posture overall
- Biggest risk is stale reporting, not churn
summary: Client relationships are healthy overall, with reporting freshness the main risk

title: Brit Expansion Proposal Notes
content:
## Proposed Expansion
- Add inbox triage and document briefing generation to Brit
- Bundle dashboard refresh automation into the monthly retainer

### Pricing Frame
- Setup fee positioned against saved coordinator hours
- Monthly fee justified by response speed and operational continuity

### Close Strategy
**Anchor on reliability first**, then show labor leverage
summary: Expansion pitch focuses on inbox triage, briefings, and reliability-led ROI

title: Field Notes — Dashboard Cleanup Backlog
content:
## Observations
- Verification table is solid but still visually dense on mobile
- Pipeline cards are easy to scan after stage moves
- Team wants one place for generated reports instead of scattered notes

### Conclusion
- A lightweight documents panel is the right additive change for this dashboard
summary: Team feedback points to a centralized documents panel as the next useful dashboard addition
